title: NIMHANS Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Research Scientist I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the post-graduation can grab this chance and apply for the NIMHANS Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Governm...
